query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS gs1_web_vocabulary;

CREATE TABLE gs1_web_vocabulary (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  termUri VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  termType ENUM('class', 'property') NOT NULL,
  termName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  domain VARCHAR(500),
  `range` VARCHAR(500),
  dppRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  esrsRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  eudrRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  packagingRelated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  sustainabilityRelated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  isDeprecated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX term_type_idx (termType),
  INDEX dpp_relevant_idx (dppRelevant),
  INDEX esrs_relevant_idx (esrsRelevant),
  INDEX eudr_relevant_idx (eudrRelevant)
);
command:

CREATE TABLE gs1_web_vocabulary (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  termUri VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  termType ENUM('class', 'property') NOT NULL,
  termName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  domain VARCHAR(500),
  `range` VARCHAR(500),
  dppRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  esrsRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  eudrRelevant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  packagingRelated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  sustainabilityRelated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  isDeprecated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX term_type_idx (termType),
  INDEX dpp_relevant_idx (dppRelevant),
  INDEX esrs_relevant_idx (esrsRelevant),
  INDEX eudr_relevant_idx (eudrRelevant)
);
